name: PB Virtual Golf
address: 230 N Congress Ave Unit A3, Lake Park, FL 33403
about: The ultimate indoor golfing sanctuary in Northern Palm Beach County. PB Virtual Golf offers a luxurious and private space tailored for golf enthusiasts to practice, play, and excel on TrackMan simulators. The facility features over 300 virtual courses, a private lounge accessible 24/7, and professional instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 300 world-class courses via precise TrackMan technology in a private, 24/7 accessible lounge. The venue offers a luxurious environment with the ability to bring your own food and drinks, and features instruction from experienced coaches.

food_and_drink.description: PB Virtual Golf has a small kitchen area and bar for you to bring your own snacks and refreshments to enjoy.
